cases.description: Declared INSERT path writes one committed row when the parent tenant exists.
seed_sql: INSERT INTO public.tenants (tenant_id, tenant_name) VALUES ('tenant-a', 'Tenant A')
cases.sql: INSERT INTO public.deals (deal_id, tenant_id, external_key, deal_name) VALUES ('deal-001', 'tenant-a', 'ext-001', 'Alpha')

cases.description: Declared ON CONFLICT primary-key rewrite keeps INSERT-style command tagging.
seed_sql: INSERT INTO public.tenants (tenant_id, tenant_name) VALUES ('tenant-a', 'Tenant A')
INSERT INTO public.deals (deal_id, tenant_id, external_key, deal_name) VALUES ('deal-001', 'tenant-a', 'ext-001', 'Alpha')
cases.sql: INSERT INTO public.deals (deal_id, tenant_id, external_key, deal_name) VALUES ('deal-001', 'tenant-a', 'ext-001-rewrite', 'Alpha Updated') ON CONFLICT (deal_id) DO UPDATE SET external_key = EXCLUDED.external_key, deal_name = EXCLUDED.deal_name

cases.description: Duplicate declared unique-key inserts surface SQLSTATE 23505.
seed_sql: INSERT INTO public.tenants (tenant_id, tenant_name) VALUES ('tenant-a', 'Tenant A')
INSERT INTO public.deals (deal_id, tenant_id, external_key, deal_name) VALUES ('deal-001', 'tenant-a', 'ext-dup', 'Alpha')
cases.sql: INSERT INTO public.deals (deal_id, tenant_id, external_key, deal_name) VALUES ('deal-002', 'tenant-a', 'ext-dup', 'Beta')

cases.description: Missing parent tenants surface SQLSTATE 23503 on declared inserts.
cases.sql: INSERT INTO public.deals (deal_id, tenant_id, external_key, deal_name) VALUES ('deal-003', 'tenant-missing', 'ext-003', 'Gamma')

cases.description: Out-of-subset INSERT ... SELECT stays explicitly classified as a refusal case.
seed_sql: INSERT INTO public.tenants (tenant_id, tenant_name) VALUES ('tenant-a', 'Tenant A')
INSERT INTO public.deals (deal_id, tenant_id, external_key, deal_name) VALUES ('deal-001', 'tenant-a', 'ext-001', 'Alpha')
cases.sql: INSERT INTO public.deals (deal_id, tenant_id, external_key, deal_name) SELECT deal_id, tenant_id, external_key, deal_name FROM public.deals
